global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear offer and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 meal offer with free delivery.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A bold, yellow 'SALE' text is positioned at the top, drawing immediate attention.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The text reads '2-for-1 tonight' in large, white font, centrally placed for visibility.

elements.label: Delivery information
elements.description: The text 'Free delivery over $15' is in smaller white font, positioned below the main offer.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The 'SnapMeal' logo appears at the top left in a simple, modern font.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small, circular badge displays '30%' in white text, located at the bottom left.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in white, centered at the bottom of the banner.

elements.label: Visual element
elements.description: A simple, outlined icon resembling a food container is placed to the left of the main offer text.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'SnapMeal' is displayed in a clean, modern font at the top.

elements.label: Offer button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with 'Get offer' text, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Discount label
elements.description: A small badge showing '30%' in white text, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Sale tag
elements.description: A small, yellow 'SALE' tag positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, free delivery
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main offer is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Free delivery over $15, SnapMeal, Get offer, 30%, SALE
